description: Composition Blue printed kurta made of 86% cotton and 14% viscose, has three-quarter sleeves, round neck, buttoned chest placket and split side seams Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This simple yet stylish printed kurta from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western kurta blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas or even leggings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
